product.imageAlt: Conquer MD compounded GLP-1 injectable product

card.title: Sermorelin
card.description: wp:paragraph → This compounded growth hormone (GH) plays a role in body composition, recovery, sleep patterns, and cellular function. As we age, GH levels may decline, which can influence factors such as muscle mass, fat distribution, and energy. Sermorelin is a peptide that mimics the body’s natural GH-releasing mechanisms. By encouraging your body's own growth hormone production, Sermorelin provides the advantages of increased HGH levels.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Healthy Aging
benefits.description: Growth hormone is involved in processes that support muscle tone, skin structure, and bone maintenance over time.

benefits.title: Natural Growth Hormone
benefits.description: Sermorelin is a growth hormone–releasing peptide that works by signaling the body’s natural GH production pathways.

benefits.title: Sleep & Recovery
benefits.description: Growth hormone plays a role in the regulation of sleep patterns and the body’s natural recovery functions.

splitContent.title: Science-Led. Purposefully Designed
splitContent.subTitle: Sermorelin is a growth hormone–releasing peptide. Peptides are short chains of amino acids, the basic building blocks of proteins, often used to support short and long term health benefits.
features: May aid recovery and muscle maintenance
Aids the body in cellular repair

quotes.quote: “Since I have been using Sermorelin, I have felt a difference in my energy and strength, along with my sleep. It has also helped with the aches in my hands and hips joints. One added bonus, I get constantly receive compliments on how young I look (I’m 53 years old)”
quotes.author: Arcangela G.

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What benefits should I expect to see (and when) from Sermorelin?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Who is my health coach?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.
